summary: Complete testing of Event Itinerary feature (roteiro). All 9 features tested and working correctly: 1) 'Planejar Roteiro' button only appears for multi-day events, 2) Modal shows all event days, 3) AI chat responds and organizes activities, 4) /api/ai/itinerary returns valid JSON, 5) /api/ai/transcribe endpoint exists and validates file, 6) Days expand to show activities with time and description, 7) Manual activity addition works, 8) Save persists data, 9) Mobile responsive layout works.

roteiro_button_only_for_period_events.details: Viagem NYC (11 days) shows 'Ver Roteiro' button, UFC White House (single day) does NOT show roteiro button

modal_shows_all_days.details: Modal displays all 11 days (17 de abr. to 27 de abr.) for Viagem NYC event

ai_chat_responds_and_organizes.details: AI responded to 'Quero visitar a Estátua da Liberdade e o Central Park' and organized activities on days 18 and 19 de abr.

api_ai_itinerary_returns_valid_json.details: Endpoint returns {success: true, message: string, itinerary: array} with activities organized by date

api_ai_transcribe_works.details: Endpoint exists, requires auth (401 without), and validates file requirement (422 without file)

days_expand_with_activities.details: Clicking day expands to show activities with time (08:00) and title (Café da manhã no hotel)

manual_activity_addition.details: Clicking '+ Adicionar manualmente' prompts for activity name and time, adds to itinerary

save_roteiro_persists_data.details: After saving, event shows 'Ver Roteiro' with '1 atividades' badge, data persists on reload

mobile_responsive.details: Mobile layout (390x844) shows stacked view with itinerary days on top, AI chat input at bottom

critical_code_review_comments: EventItinerary.jsx is well-structured with clear separation of AI chat and itinerary display
API_URL uses import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL with empty string fallback - works with Vite proxy
AI response parsing handles both JSON and raw text responses gracefully
Voice recording uses MediaRecorder API with proper cleanup of audio tracks
Mobile responsive design uses lg:flex-row for two-column on desktop, stacked on mobile
seed_data_creation: Added test itinerary to Viagem NYC event with 'Café da manhã no hotel' activity
context_for_next_testing_agent: Event Itinerary feature fully implemented and working. EventItinerary.jsx handles AI chat with GPT-4o via Emergent LLM Key, voice input via Whisper, and manual activity addition. The 'Planejar Roteiro' button only appears for multi-day events (isMultiDayEvent check in EventsPanel.jsx). Itinerary data is stored in event.itinerary array and persisted via /api/data endpoint.
